title: Battle of Theed (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Battle of Theed''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Capture of Theed]]''', the [[Trade Federation]]'s takeover of [[Theed]].
*'''[[Battle of Naboo]]''', also known as the '''Battle of Theed'''
*'''[[Plan to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine]]''' during the [[Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Battle of Theed]]''', a battle during [[Operation: Cinder]] of the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Capture of Theed/Legends|Capture of Theed]]''' by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]
*'''[[Theed Palace Plaza Prison Break]]'''
*'''[[Rescue mission in Theed]]''' by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*The '''[[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]''', also known as the '''Assault on Theed'''
*The '''[[Plan to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine/Legends|Plan to kidnap Chancellor Palpatine]]''' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*The '''[[Attack on Theed]]''' during the Clone Wars
*The '''[[Uprising in Theed]]''' in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]].
*The '''[[Terrorist attack in Theed]]''' in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]

==Comic==
*''[[Battle for Theed]]'', a promotional mini-comic.

{{Disambig}}

|fi=Theedin taistelu (täsmennyssivu)
}}
